lesson.menu_desc: Review of Lessons 8-11: directions, weather, shopping, describing people -- conversation simulation -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Review + Consolidation 2 -- Putting It Together
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 12 -- Review + Consolidation 2

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my Saturday. In the morning it is sunny, so I walk to the store near my house. To get there, I go straight and turn left at the corner. The store is not expensive, so I buy bread, fruit, and coffee. The man at the store is tall and very friendly. In the afternoon it is cloudy and cold, so I stay at home. This is my simple Saturday.

Hello, this is Maria. Today the weather is windy and a little cold. I need to go to the store, but it is far. I take the bus to the center. I get off near the station and walk straight for two minutes. At the store I ask: how much is this jacket? It is expensive, so I buy a cheap one. My friend Ana is there too. She is short, with long hair, and she is very kind. We have coffee together. It is a nice day.

extra_audio.text: First, talk about the weather today. Second, say where you go and how you get there. Third, say what you buy at the store. Fourth, describe a person you meet. Fifth, say goodbye.
